title: avenula letourneuxii
intro: Avenula letourneuxii, also known as Letourneux's oat-grass, is a species of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, helping to soothe and calm irritated skin and wounds. The health benefits of Avenula letourneuxii include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and skin conditions such as eczema. Herbal preparations of Avenula letourneuxii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used externally or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
